sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: What Are The Benefits Of Flying Delta Air Lines' Premium Select?
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines' Premium Select offers a premium economy experience with wider seats, increased legroom, an elevated dining experience, and enhanced amenities. This service, positioned between Main Cabin and Delta One, focuses on long-haul comfort and includes SkyPriority services. Premium Select is available on many long-haul international routes and select transcontinental and Hawaiian domestic flights, with plans for inclusion on future fleet additions like the Airbus A350-1000s and Boeing 787-10 Dreamliners.

feed.title: Alibaba Just Launched New AI Models for Video Games. Does That Make BABA Stock a Buy?

Despite a recent stock drop, analysts maintain a "Strong Buy" rating for BABA, citing its long-term growth potential in AI and cloud computing, even though short-term profits are pressured by high investment costs.

feed.title: Why My Amex Platinum Isn’t for Spending — It’s My Benefits Card
feed.summary: The article explains how the author uses their Amex Platinum card primarily for its extensive benefits and statement credits rather than for everyday spending. Despite an $895 annual fee, the author justifies its cost by leveraging perks like 5x points on airfare, various statement credits (digital entertainment, Resy, Uber, hotel, Walmart+, lululemon), and premium travel benefits like airport lounge access and Global Entry/TSA PreCheck credits. The author emphasizes that while the card is invaluable for travel perks, its low earning rate on most purchases means other cards are used for daily spending.

Alphabet possesses significant advantages with its dominant market share in search and browser, substantial advertising revenue, and strong cash reserves to fund its AI investments.
